creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, I gave too few information but I don't know which informations do you need.

FreeBSD version: 10.3-RELEASE-p16
I'm using quarterly (not latest) from the official package repository. The 'otter-browser' version is 0.9.11_1.

Some time later I will recompile it with debug flags, please patient :)
